title: Mpox vaccination clinical resources: Introduction - Canada.ca
content:
## Mpox vaccination clinical resources: Introduction
- Sample information sheets, consent forms, after care sheets
- Managing vaccine administration errors or deviations
The purpose of this web page is to provide health care professionals clinical guidance and tools for mpox vaccination and how to manage vaccine administration errors or deviations. Updates to the content are anticipated as vaccine information evolves, and new evidence becomes available.
These sites should be used in conjunction with other available guidance for health care practitioners on the use and administration of the Imvamune vaccine including:
- National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) recommendations
- Smallpox and mpox vaccine: Canadian Immunization Guide
- Imvamune product monograph
- Canadian Immunization Guide: Part 1 - Key Immunization Information
- Canadian Immunization Guide: Part 2 - Vaccine Safety
